summary: The effective strategies include using smaller needles and reinserting the stylet; frovatriptan may also help reduce incidence but needs more research. Fluid supplements have not been shown to be an effective strategy for preventing post-dural puncture headaches. Given options provided, fluid supplementation is excluded as less beneficial compared to other interventions mentioned here.
